title: drain() uses DEFERRED tx: two concurrent drains double-deliver offline queue
description: store.rs:760 uses pool.begin() (DEFERRED) for drain(). With SQLite connection pool size 5 and a reconnecting client, two concurrent drain() calls for the same pub_id can both SELECT the same rows before either runs the DELETE, delivering the same offline messages twice. Fix: use BEGIN IMMEDIATE in drain() so the second caller blocks until the first commit completes. In practice the ws.rs drain loop (line 587) is sequential per-connection, but two rapid reconnects could race.
